title: [Let's Do Meadow] - Sawmill Compat
description: This mod replaces the woodcutter of Meadow with Sawmill
body:
This simple datapack replaces the Woodcutter of Meadow with the [Sawmill](https://modrinth.com/mod/universal-sawmill)

![Sawmill](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02a799d5ae06f01d4aadf93564cb30fb68e609fe.png)

To remove the original Woodcutter from the game you can use the [Reliable Remover](https://modrinth.com/mod/reliable-remover) mod.
